texto: If you have to choose between your self-respect & ego and other person
autor: choose your self-respect & ego.Because other person may leave you at their will but your self-respect & ego will always support and carry you even in toughest situations.
explicacao: Orientação direta de choose your self-respect & ego.Because other person may leave you at their will but your self-respect & ego will always support and carry you even in toughest situations. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “If you have to choose between your self-respect & ego and other person” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, nikita-dudani, choose, útil em momentos de reflexao.
